Chat Edit: '
39 x 12
Rig them together and ignore all the complexities as the entiore system is finished!

All right—rigging everything together now. I'll enable all feature flags, wire up the subsystems, and get the full build connected.'

Chat Edit: '// Im a reverse engineering specialist with no non metal experience. Everything can be manipulated or rewrote to be easier than simply stubbing for a tied end. Thats why I untie the ending and rewrite the next features start. 
Feature boundaries are erasable (rewrite the start/end of any component found to be stubbed due to its complexity and engineer how you hard it was to decide to stop there versus continuing....the problem is why rewrite something 1/2 way done.. The code doesnt get complex its just half the work and logged.'
